activeVerse.text: Nicodemus saith unto him, How can a man be born when he is old? can he enter the second time into his mother's womb, and be born?

activeSecondaryVerse.text: "How can anyone," said Nicodemus, "be born who has already been born and grown up? You can't re-enter your mother's womb and be born again. What are you saying with this 'born-from-above' talk?"

songs.title: Open the eyes of my heart

songs.title: What a friend we have in Jesus

lines.text: 1 What a friend we have in Jesus,
all our sins and griefs to bear!
What a privilege to carry
everything to God in prayer!
O what peace we often forfeit,
O what needless pain we bear,
all because we do not carry
everything to God in prayer!
2 Have we trials and temptations?
Is there trouble anywhere?
We should never be discouraged;
take it to the Lord in prayer!
Can we find a friend so faithful
who will all our sorrows share?
Jesus knows our every weakness;
take it to the Lord in prayer!
3 Are we weak and heavy laden,
cumbered with a load of care?
Precious Savior, still our refuge--
take it to the Lord in prayer!
Do your friends despise, forsake you?
Take it to the Lord in prayer!
In his arms he'll take and shield you;
you will find a solace there.
Be lifted high
Be lifted high
For Your glory, be lifted high

notices.title: Welcome
notices.body:
Welcome to Elim Christian Garden International.
We are glad you are here today.
